title: Dykes or dams; excavations
doc_html:
§724.  Dykes or dams; excavations

The governing authority of a parish may build dykes or dams, dig canals, or excavate lake or stream beds whenever such work is necessary to the creation and establishment of such preserves, and may appropriate and expend the money necessary therefor.
doc_text:
§724.  Dykes or dams; excavations
The governing authority of a parish may build dykes or dams, dig canals, or excavate lake or stream beds whenever such work is necessary to the creation and establishment of such preserves, and may appropriate and expend the money necessary therefor.
